---
title: "Arbovirus Disease Activity Report"
subtitle: "Pool Testing Summary — All Diseases"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
      smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
  word_document:
    toc: true
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.height = 5,
  fig.width  = 8
)
```

```{=html}
<style>
  body { font-family: 'Source Sans Pro', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #2c3e50; }
  h1, h2 { color: #1a5276; border-bottom: 2px solid #2e86c1; padding-bottom: 6px; }
  h3 { color: #2471a3; }
  .note-box  { background:#eaf4fb; border-left:4px solid #2e86c1; padding:12px 16px; border-radius:4px; margin:15px 0; }
  .warn-box  { background:#fdedec; border-left:4px solid #e74c3c; padding:12px 16px; border-radius:4px; margin:15px 0; }
  .stat-row  { display:flex; gap:20px; margin:20px 0; flex-wrap:wrap; }
  .stat-card { background:#eaf4fb; border-radius:8px; padding:16px 24px; flex:1; min-width:150px; text-align:center; }
  .stat-card .number { font-size:2em; font-weight:bold; color:#1a5276; }
  .stat-card .label  { font-size:0.9em; color:#566573; margin-top:4px; }
  .disease-positive .number { color: #c0392b; }
</style>
```

```{r load-packages}
library(vectorsurvR)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r config}
# ── USER CONFIGURATION
#───────────────────────────────────────
#
AGENCY_ID   <- 55     # Your agency ID
TARGET_YEAR <- 2020   # Surveillance year
WEEK_START  <- 22     # First epi week of reporting period
WEEK_END    <- 26     # Last epi week of reporting period
IS_HTML     <- TRUE   # Set to FALSE when knitting to Word or PDF
WEEK_SEQ <- as.character(seq(WEEK_START,WEEK_END, by =  1))
# Diseases to report on — set to NULL to include all diseases in your data
TARGET_DISEASES <- c("WNV", "SLEV")

# Derived label used throughout the report
WEEK_LABEL <- paste0("Weeks ", WEEK_START, "\u2013", WEEK_END, ", ", TARGET_YEAR)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

```{r auth, results='hide'}
token <- getToken()
```

```{r load-data, cache=TRUE}
pools <- getPools(
  token,
  start_year = TARGET_YEAR,
  end_year   = TARGET_YEAR,
  arthropod  = "mosquito",
  agency_ids = AGENCY_ID
) %>%
  mutate(epiweek = epiweek(as.Date(collection_date)))

# Filter to reporting period
pools_period <- pools %>%
  filter(epiweek >= WEEK_START & epiweek <= WEEK_END)

# Apply disease filter if specified, otherwise use all
if (!is.null(TARGET_DISEASES)) {
  pools_period <- pools_period %>%
    filter(test_target_acronym %in% TARGET_DISEASES)
}

# Diseases present in data
diseases_present <- sort(unique(pools_period$test_target_acronym))
```

---

```{r report-subtitle, results='asis'}
cat(paste0("## Disease Activity Summary — ", WEEK_LABEL))
```

```{r summary-stats}
total_pools    <- n_distinct(pools_period$pool_num)
positive_pools <- pools_period %>%
  filter(tolower(test_status_name) == "confirmed") %>%
  n_distinct(.$pool_num)
total_tested   <- n_distinct(pools_period$pool_num)
n_diseases     <- n_distinct(pools_period$test_target_acronym)
```

```{=html}
<div class="stat-row">
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="number">`r total_pools`</div>
    <div class="label">Pools Tested</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="number">`r n_diseases`</div>
    <div class="label">Diseases Tested</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card disease-positive">
    <div class="number">`r positive_pools`</div>
    <div class="label">Positive Pools</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{r overall-alert, results='asis'}
if (IS_HTML) {
  if (positive_pools > 0) {
    cat('<div class="warn-box">⚠️ <strong>Arbovirus Activity Detected:</strong>',
        positive_pools, 'positive pool(s) confirmed in', WEEK_LABEL,
        '— see per-disease sections below for details.</div>')
  } else {
    cat('<div class="note-box">✅ <strong>No positive pools</strong> detected in',
        WEEK_LABEL, 'across all diseases tested.</div>')
  }
} else {
  if (positive_pools > 0) {
    cat("> **⚠️ Arbovirus Activity Detected:**", positive_pools,
        "positive pool(s) confirmed in", WEEK_LABEL)
  } else {
    cat("> **✅ No positive pools** detected in", WEEK_LABEL)
  }
}
```

---

## Pool Testing Overview — All Diseases

```{r all-diseases-table}
pools_period %>%
  group_by(test_target_acronym) %>%
  summarise(
    Pools_Tested  = n_distinct(pool_num),
    Positive      = sum(tolower(test_status_name) == "confirmed", na.rm = TRUE),
    Negative      = sum(tolower(test_status_name) == "negative", na.rm = TRUE),
    Pending       = sum(!tolower(test_status_name) %in% c("confirmed", "negative"), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups       = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Positive)) %>%
  kbl(
    col.names = c("Disease", "Pools Tested", "Positive", "Negative", "Pending"),
    caption   = paste("Pool testing summary by disease —", WEEK_LABEL)
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"),
    font_size         = 13,
    latex_options     = "scale_down"
  ) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#2C3E50", color = "white")
```

---

## Positive Pools by Week

```{r positives-by-week}
positives_week <- pools_period %>%
  filter(tolower(test_status_name) == "confirmed") %>%
  group_by(epiweek, test_target_acronym) %>%
  summarise(positive_pools = n(), .groups = "drop")

if (nrow(positives_week) > 0) {
  ggplot(positives_week, aes(x = factor(epiweek), y = positive_pools,
                              fill = test_target_acronym)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#c0392b", "#e67e22", "#8e44ad",
                                  "#2e86c1", "#1a5276", "#117a65")) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Positive Pools by Week —", WEEK_LABEL),
      x     = "Epi Week",
      y     = "Positive Pools",
      fill  = "Disease"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = "#1a5276"))
} else {
  cat("No positive pools detected in this reporting period.")
}
```

---

## Per-Disease Sections

```{r per-disease, results='asis'}
for (disease in diseases_present) {

  cat(paste0("\n\n### ", disease, "\n\n"))

  disease_pools <- pools_period %>%
    filter(test_target_acronym == disease)

  n_tested   <- n_distinct(disease_pools$pool_num)
  n_positive <- disease_pools %>%
    filter(tolower(test_status_name) == "confirmed") %>% nrow()

  cat(paste0("**", n_tested, "** pools tested &nbsp;|&nbsp; **", n_positive,
             "** positive\n\n"))

  # Infection rate table
  ir <- tryCatch(
    getInfectionRate(
      pools          = pools,
      interval       = "Week",
      target_year    = TARGET_YEAR,
      target_disease = disease,
      pt_estimate    = "mle",
      scale          = 1000
    ) %>% filter(Week >= WEEK_START & Week <= WEEK_END),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (!is.null(ir) && nrow(ir) > 0) {
    print(
      ir %>%
        kbl(caption = paste(disease, "infection rate (per 1,000) —", WEEK_LABEL)) %>%
        kable_styling(
          bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"),
          font_size         = 13,
          latex_options     = "scale_down"
        ) %>%
        row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#2C3E50", color = "white")
    )
  }

  cat("\n\n")

  # Positive pool detail table
  positives <- disease_pools %>%
    filter(tolower(test_status_name) == "confirmed")

  if (nrow(positives) > 0) {
    print(
      positives %>%
        select(collection_date, site_code, species_display_name,
               num_count, trap_acronym, epiweek) %>%
        arrange(epiweek, collection_date) %>%
        kbl(
          col.names = c("Date", "Site", "Species", "Mosquitoes", "Trap", "Epi Week"),
          caption   = paste(disease, "confirmed positive pools —", WEEK_LABEL)
        ) %>%
        kable_styling(
          bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"),
          font_size         = 13,
          latex_options     = "scale_down"
        ) %>%
        row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#c0392b", color = "white")
    )
  } else {
    cat(paste0("No ", disease, " positive pools detected in ", WEEK_LABEL, ".\n\n"))
  }

  # Pool testing map
  plotPoolsMap(
      token          = token,
      target_year    = TARGET_YEAR,
      target_disease = disease,
      interval       = "Week",
      time_period    = WEEK_SEQ,
      agency_ids     = AGENCY_ID,
      html           = IS_HTML
    )
   
}
```

## Summary

```{r written-summary, results='asis'}
disease_summary <- pools_period %>%
  filter(tolower(test_status_name) == "confirmed") %>%
  group_by(test_target_acronym) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(n))

if (nrow(disease_summary) > 0) {
  disease_text <- paste(
    paste0(disease_summary$test_target_acronym, " (", disease_summary$n, ")"),
    collapse = ", "
  )
  cat(paste0(
    "During **", WEEK_LABEL, "**, a total of **", total_pools,
    " pools** were submitted for testing across **", n_diseases, " diseases**. ",
    "**", positive_pools, " positive pool(s)** were confirmed: ", disease_text, ". ",
    "Refer to the per-disease sections above for infection rate estimates and site-level detail."
  ))
} else {
  cat(paste0(
    "During **", WEEK_LABEL, "**, a total of **", total_pools,
    " pools** were submitted for testing across **", n_diseases, " diseases**. ",
    "**No positive pools** were detected in this reporting period."
  ))
}
```

---

*Report generated using the `vectorsurvR` package. Data sourced from the VectorSurv Gateway.*
